title: Thursday
content:
And if I loved you Wednesday,
        Well, what is that to you?
    I do not love you Thursday--
        So much is true.

    And why you come complaining
        Is more than I can see.
    I loved you Wednesday,--yes--but what
        Is that to me?
meaning:
Edna St. Vincent Millay's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Thursday"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
